content: The incomplete, iteratively searched knowledge traces that frame both Topic A and Topic B can be reframed as the core of a 2025 retrieval-augmented memory agent architecture, where an agent’s own ongoing curiosity-driven knowledge acquisition becomes its dynamic external retrieval corpus. Instead of pre-loading a static external knowledge base, the agent builds its retrievable memory incrementally through partial, open-ended search traces left by its own curiosity-driven active learning cycles.
